title: MPESB Hospital Assistant Online Form 2026 for 1200 Post
short_information: Madhya Pradesh Employee Selection Board MPESB has Released Hospital Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification. Those candidates who are interested in this MPESB Hospital Assistant Vacancy 2026 can Apply Online from 07/05/2026 to 23/05/2026. Read the notification for recruitment eligibility, post information, selection procedure, pay scale and all other information. Madhya Pradesh Employee Selection Board (MPESB) MPESB MP Hospital Assistant Recruitment 2026 MPESB Hospital Assistant Exam 2026 : Short Details of Notification
application_fee: General / Other State : 560/- OBC / SC / ST : 310/- Portal Charges: Rs. 60/- (Include) Pay the Examination Fee Through Cast at E Challan or Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking MPESB Hospital Assistant 2026 Post

tables.table_name: MPESB Hospital Assistant 2026 Post Notification 2026: Age Limit as on 01/01/2026 Minimum Age : 18 Years Maximum Age : 40 Years Age Relaxation Extra as per MPESB MP Hospital Assistant 2026 Recruitment Test -2026 Recruitment Rules.
rows: Class 10th High School Exam Passed from Any Recognized Board in India. For More Eligibility Details Read the Notification.
